nodes.context: Italian Canadian crime family based in Montreal, Quebec, active from 1940s to 2000s.
New York-based Mafia family that considered the Cotroni family a branch.
Sicilian faction that overtook the Cotroni family as preeminent crime family in Montreal.
Toronto-based 'ndrina allied with Cotroni family in the 1990s.
Outlaw motorcycle gang with East End Vancouver chapter allied with Cotroni family.
Montreal-based gang involved in drug network with Cotroni family.
French-Canadian gang led by Richard Blass, rival to Cotroni family.
Outlaw motorcycle gang rival to Cotroni family during Quebec Biker War.

edges.evidence_quote: The United States Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) considered the family a branch of the Bonanno crime family of New York City.
edges.context: The Cotroni family was considered a branch of the Bonanno family.

edges.evidence_quote: This allowed the Sicilian Rizzuto faction to overtake the Cotroni's Calabrian faction as the preeminent crime family in Montreal.
edges.context: The Rizzuto faction overtook the Cotroni family after an internal war.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bonanno crime family, Commisso 'ndrina, Hells Angels MC, West End Gang
edges.context: The Commisso 'ndrina is listed as an ally of the Cotroni family.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bonanno crime family, Commisso 'ndrina, Hells Angels MC, West End Gang
edges.context: The Hells Angels MC is listed as an ally of the Cotroni family.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bonanno crime family, Commisso 'ndrina, Hells Angels MC, West End Gang
edges.context: The West End Gang is listed as an ally of the Cotroni family.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Blass gang, Dubois gang, Rizzuto crime family, Rock Machine MC
edges.context: The Blass gang is listed as a rival of the Cotroni family.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Blass gang, Dubois gang, Rizzuto crime family, Rock Machine MC
edges.context: The Dubois gang is listed as a rival of the Cotroni family.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Blass gang, Dubois gang, Rizzuto crime family, Rock Machine MC
